text.tspan: sm_NNN tells the compiler what your GPU can do.
Software built for sm_100 (datacenter) often assumes HBM bandwidth + datacenter drivers.
Software built for sm_120 (consumer) may miss unified-memory paths.
sm_121 is its own family. Best inference engines today: vLLM (NVFP4), Ollama / llama.cpp (GGUF).
